ham.subject: Weekly Marketing Update – Boost Your Sales this September
ham.body:
Hello Team,

It’s time for our weekly marketing update! This week we have some exciting offers that you can share with your clients to boost sales.

• **New Discount Pack** – 20% off on all premium products.
• **Referral Bonus** – Earn ₹500 for every successful referral.
• **Flash Sale** – 48-hour exclusive deal on best-sellers.

Aapko yeh offers apne customers ko batana hoga, aur unke liye special coupons generate karne hain. Just follow the steps in the attached guide.

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or call our support desk.

Thanks for your continuous effort. Let’s make this month a record breaker!

Best regards,

Marketing Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Schedule Your Zoom Meeting Today – Limited Slots Available
spam.body:
Dear {Name},

Hum aapko ek important Zoom meeting ke liye invite kar rahe hain jo tomorrow 10:00 AM IST ko scheduled hai. Yeh meeting aapke project ke liye bahut crucial hai.

**Meeting Details:**
Date: 2026-04-16
Time: 10:00 AM IST
Platform: Zoom

Please join the meeting by clicking the link below:
<URL>

Krupya 9:00 AM IST tak is email ka reply karke apni attendance confirm karein.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,

ABC Corp
Customer Support Team
